title: Cosmos Beam
description: A simple mod that adds a configurable beacon beam block.
body:
![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e44195adb1ff7ff311bf6ffb19ebd7ea24a9194.png)

# **Cosmos Beam**

### **Notices**

Cosmos Beam is now available for **1.21.1** and **NeoForge**.

### **Description**

Cosmos Beam is a simple mod that adds a single block: Beam.

It is used to create beacon or end gateway style beams for decoration purposes. The beams can be coloured to any of Minecraft's 16 colours.

### **Dependencies**

Cosmos Portals requires **Cosmos Library** in order to function, please download the latest version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmos-library).

## **The Cosmos Series**

This mod is part of **[The Cosmos Series](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-cosmos-series)**.
